response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:46: Performer talking and merchandise promotion, no full vocal song. 2. 01:46-03:09: Performer singing 'GREATEST'. 3. Searched for '音乃瀬奏 GREATEST 歌詞 英語'. response.global_summary: A video from #音乃瀬奏生誕祭2026 featuring an intro talk and a full vocal performance of her original song "GREATEST".

scenes.description: The performer introduces her merchandise set and talks with the audience.
The performer performs a dance and vocal cover of the song 'GREATEST'.
